raw_text:
```json
{
  "claim_texts": [
    "Refinery closures could cause gas prices to surpass $8 per gallon by 2026.",
    "Hispanic households would be disproportionately affected by rising gas prices.",
    "Affordable fuel is essential for millions of working-class Californians, especially in construction, agriculture, and service industries.",
    "The energy industry has provided tens of thousands of good-paying, upwardly mobile jobs to Hispanic workers.",
    "Refinery closures threaten to gut good-paying jobs in the energy industry.",
    "Maintaining existing refining capacity while building new clean energy infrastructure is necessary.",
    "Streamlining regulatory and permitting processes can offer businesses clarity and stability.",

  ]
```
